_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression
_publications._context: Describes Nf1f/f;Trp53f/f;CGD conditional knockout model. CGD encodes Cre recombinase, enhanced histone 2B-GFP, and diphtheria toxin receptor under the Nestin promoter. Used to study NF1 MPNST cancer stem cells.

_publications._publicationTitle: Hydroxychloroquine prevents resistance to SHP2 inhibition in NF1-mutant cancers
_publications._context: Kinase enrichment proteomic analysis (MIB/MS) of NF1 MPNST tumors from the NP (Nf1flox/flox;Trp53flox/flox;CGD) GEMM treated with SHP099 and/or trametinib. PRIDE accession PXD035999.

basicInfo.description: Conditional double knockout of Nf1 and Trp53 driven by the CGD transgene (Cre recombinase, enhanced histone 2B-GFP, and diphtheria toxin receptor under the Nestin promoter). Abbreviated 'NP' in the Parada lab. Develops NF1-associated malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs). Also referred to as Nf1f/f;Trp53f/f;Nes-TK.
